<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration; use DOMElement; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class CoverageCloverToReport extends LogToReportMigration { protected function forType(): string { return 'coverage-clover'; } protected function toReportFormat(DOMElement $logNode): DOMElement { $clover = $logNode->ownerDocument->createElement('clover'); $clover->setAttribute('outputFile', $logNode->getAttribute('target')); return $clover; } }
